title: Ordinary World
why_this_song: Ordinary World by Duran Duran (1992) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 14 times; first heard in: "There's an ordinary world"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "There's an ordinary world"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I will learn to survive"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I will learn to survive"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Where is the life that I recognize? (Gone away)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Passion or coincidence once prompted you to say
Well, now pride's gone out the window
Where is the life that I recognize? (Gone away)
But I won't cry for yesterday

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "world" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "world" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ordinary" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ordinary" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Thought I heard you talking softly
Well, now pride's gone out the window
Ours is just a little sorrowed talk

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Still I can't escape the ghost of you

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Ordinary World" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Ordinary World" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Ordinary World" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Ordinary World"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Duran Duran one question about "Ordinary World", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Duran Duran sobre "Ordinary World", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
